fields.label: Template Name or ID
fields.description: The template you want to send. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: From Email
fields.description: Email address of the sender optional with name

fields.label: To Email
fields.description: Email address of the recipient. Multiple ones can be separated by comma.

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: async, autoText, autoHtml, bccAddress, fromName, googleAnalyticsCampaign, googleAnalyticsDomains, html, important, inlineCss, ipPool, preserveRecipients, returnPathDomain, sendAt, signingDomain, subAccount, subject, tags, text, trackClicks, trackOpens, trackingDomain, urlStripQs, viewContentLink)

fields.label: Merge Vars
fields.description: Global merge variables

fields.label: Merge Vars
fields.description: Per-recipient merge variables (JSON object; supported keys: mergeVarsValues, mergeVarsValues.name, mergeVarsValues.content)

fields.label: Metadata
fields.description: Metadata an associative array of user metadata. Mandrill will store this metadata and make it available for retrieval. In addition, you can select up to 10 metadata fields to index and make searchable using the Mandrill search api. (JSON object; supported keys: metadataValues, metadataValues.name, metadataValues.value)

fields.label: Metadata
fields.description: Metadata an associative array of user metadata. Mandrill will store this metadata and make it available for retrieval. In addition, you can select up to 10 metadata fields to index and make searchable using the Mandrill search api.

fields.label: Attachments
fields.description: An array of supported attachments to add to the message

fields.label: Attachments
fields.description: Array of supported attachments to add to the message (JSON object; supported keys: attachmentsValues, attachmentsValues.type, attachmentsValues.name, attachmentsValues.content, attachmentsBinary, attachmentsBinary.property)

fields.label: Headers
fields.description: Optional extra headers to add to the message (most headers are allowed)

fields.label: Headers
fields.description: Optional extra headers to add to the message (most headers are allowed) (JSON object; supported keys: headersValues, headersValues.name, headersValues.value)
